# Account and execution identifiers are sanitized. The capture freezes the
# public API behavior after the completed-order TRAIL LIMIT decode fix:
# both apiOnly=false and apiOnly=true requests reach completedOrdersEnd.

server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DU9000001"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":297}

client req_completed_orders {"api_only":true}
server completed_order {"contract":{"con_id":265598,"symbol":"AAPL","sec_type":"STK","exchange":"SMART","currency":"USD"},"action":"SELL","order_type":"MKT","status":"Filled","quantity":"5","filled":"5","remaining":"0"}

disconnect
